# Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

**Project:** secretbank
**Maintainer:** phoodul (phoodul@gmail.com)

By submitting a pull request or otherwise contributing to this project, you agree to the following terms:

## 1. Ownership

You confirm that you are the original author of your contribution, or have the right to submit it on behalf of the copyright holder, and that the contribution does not infringe any third-party intellectual property rights.

## 2. License Grant

You grant the secretbank maintainer a **perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty-free license** — including the right to sublicense — to reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute your contribution and derivative works thereof under any license, including proprietary licenses.

## 3. Patent Grant

You grant the secretbank maintainer a **perpetual, irrevocable, worldwide, royalty-free patent license** — including the right to sublicense — to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer your contribution where such license applies to those patent claims necessarily infringed by your contribution alone or in combination with the project.

## 4. Future License Changes

You acknowledge that the maintainer may relicense the codebase in the future (e.g., to a different open-source or proprietary license) and that your contribution may be included under such future license without further consent.

## 5. No Warranty

You represent that your contribution is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind, and that you have disclosed any known third-party claims or encumbrances.

## 한국어 요약 (Korean TLDR)

이 저장소에 기여(PR 제출 등)하면 다음에 동의하는 것으로 간주됩니다.

- 기여물의 저작권이 본인에게 있거나 제출 권한이 있음을 확인합니다.
- 메인테이너에게 기여물에 대한 **영구적·취소 불가능·전 세계적·무상 저작권 및 특허 라이선스**를 부여합니다 (재라이선스 권한 포함).
- 메인테이너가 향후 프로젝트 라이선스를 변경할 수 있음에 동의합니다.
- 제3자의 지식재산권 침해가 없음을 보증합니다.
